---
title: "README"
author: "D VALLIS"
date: "2026-03-26"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Requirements

Install R packages:
  ```r
install.packages(c("sandwich", "lmtest", "stringr", "readxl", "dplyr",
                   "purrr", "tibble", "stringdist", "jsonlite", "ggplot2"))
```

## How to run

1. Clone this repository
2. Open R or RStudio with the repo root as your working directory
3. To run the full pipeline and analysis:
  ```r
source("analysis.R")
```

Or run just the data pipeline:
  ```r
source("pipeline.R")
```

## Files

- `pipeline.R` — downloads XLSX files from GitHub, parses them, and produces `combined_by_sheet`
- `analysis.R` — runs regressions and plots results (sources `pipeline.R` automatically)
- `keys.R` — column matching definitions
